author: yuzebin
title: Hard Layer Violation in Core Work Queue
caveats: Imported symbols are pure data constants with zero dependencies — not behavioral coupling
Trivial fix: relocate two constant definitions (~10 lines)
Lazy import means no circular import error at module load time
Not a fundamental design flaw — it's a misplaced constant definition
verified_claims: Violates documented layer import direction rule (engine is Layer 1, app is Layer 4)
Violates documented dynamic import allowlist (only languages/__init__.py and engine/hook_registry.py)
No try/except fallback unlike the similar violation in dimension_rows.py
overstated_claims: 16+ lazy imports in engine layer — not verified in detail, secondary to main finding
